name: Rebel Firebrand
visual_description: A defiant human rebel with singed clothes and burn scars on bare arms, holding a torch aloft with wild intensity. Flames dance across their hands and face, eyes blazing with fury. Behind them, a Fist officer in splint mail and ceremonial insignia lies crumpled, their revolver-pistol fallen nearby.
full_prompt: A defiant human rebel with singed clothes and burn scars on bare arms, holding a torch aloft with wild intensity. Flames dance across their hands and face, eyes blazing with fury. Behind them, a Fist officer in splint mail and ceremonial insignia lies crumpled, their revolver-pistol fallen nearby.. Stylized digital illustration, structured balanced composition, warm sandstone and ivory tones, golden-hour lighting with long shadows, post-apocalyptic science-fantasy setting.
